speaking.title: Speaking Part 2: Describe a friend

bullets: and explain why you like this friend

speaking.sampleAnswer: I would like to talk about my best friend, Mai. She is tall and young, with long, curly hair. She is very friendly and kind, so I really enjoy spending time with her.

speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Personality
questions: Do you have a lot of energy?
Are you ever nervous before a test?
speaking.sampleAnswer: Yes, I am a calm person. I have a lot of energy in the morning. I am a little nervous before tests, but I always try my best.
